title: Invariant Integration & Hardening
purpose: Integrate invariant validation into the governance runtime: CI gates, pre-commit hooks, and continuous monitoring.
architectural_constraints: Invariant checks must not block emergency recovery
CI gate fails on critical invariant violations
Continuous monitoring emits periodic validation reports
acceptance_criteria: CI blocks PRs with critical invariant violations
Emergency bypass available with audit trail

traceability.description: Implemented CI invariant gate and continuous invariant monitor
